name: Road to Ofcol
description:
You are walking on a wide road with trail marks on it.  To the north
you see the village of Ofcol and to the south there is the T intersection.
You can enter the foothills west.  The foothills to your east are too
steep to climb.

exits.description: You can see the T-intersection in the souther direction.
You think you can climb these foothills.
